title: zornia oligantha
intro: Zornia oligantha, also known as smallflower zornia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to the southern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, as well as supporting the immune system. Zornia oligantha can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various forms of administration for its medicinal properties.
